title: Create DesignTokens enum with spacing and corner radius scales
description: Add DesignTokens enum with spacing scale (4,8,12,16,20,24,32,40,48,64) and corner radius tokens (xs=6, sm=10, md=14, lg=18, xl=22, 2xl=26, 3xl=30, full=100). Purely additive, no breaking changes.

title: Refactor AppThemePalette with new color tokens for dark/light mode
description: Add new color tokens (background, groupedBG, surface, surfaceElevated, accent, accentSecondary, textPrimary, textSecondary, textTertiary, runeText, success, warning, error, separator) with adaptive dark/light variants. Transition from 3-theme to single dark+light system.

title: Update GlassCard and GlassButton with new glass material tokens
description: Add 3 intensity levels (Strong: blur 60/sat 2.0, Medium: blur 40/sat 1.8, Light: blur 24/sat 1.5) and glass BG/Border/Highlight tokens for dark/light.

title: Phase 1 build verification
description: Run xcodebuild -scheme RunicQuotes build to verify all existing views compile with new tokens.

title: Phase 2: Refactor MainTabView to 5-tab navigation with Tab enum and stub views
description: Create AppTab enum, refactor MainTabView from 2 to 5 tabs (Home, Collections, Search, Saved, Settings), create stub CollectionsView/SearchView/SavedView with empty states, update notification names, verify build

title: Phase 3: Redesign Home/QuoteView with new design tokens
description: Migrate QuoteView to use adaptive palette, DesignTokens spacing, new GlassCard intensity API. Update quote card layout, action bar, script picker per Figma Core Screens design.

title: Phase 3: Implement CollectionsView with grid layout
description: Build collection browsing grid with cover cards, filter options. Reference Core Screens Figma.

title: Phase 3: Implement SearchView with filters and results
description: Build search UI with chip filters, results list, empty/no-results states. Reference Core Screens Figma.

title: Phase 3: Implement SavedView with quote list
description: Build saved quotes list with sort/filter options and empty state. Reference States Figma.

title: Phase 3: Redesign SettingsView with grouped glass sections
description: Update SettingsView to use new GlassCard intensity API, adaptive palette, DesignTokens spacing. Reference Settings Figma.

title: Phase 4: Redesign OnboardingView with 5-step flow (Splash, Intro, Atmosphere, Notifications, Ready)
description: Rewrite OnboardingView to match Figma 5-step onboarding. Use adaptive palette, DesignTokens, GlassCard intensity API. Preserve AppStorage completion logic.

title: Extend QuoteRepository with create/update methods
description: Add createQuote and updateQuote to protocol and SwiftData impl

title: Phase 6: Create ShareQuoteView with quote card preview and share actions (Copy/Save/Share)
description: Create ShareQuoteView with card preview (dark/light), bottom action bar (Copy/Save/Share), and update QuoteView to present it. Share card: rune ornament, runic text, quote, author, dots, branding.

title: QuotePack model + QuotePacksView browse list
description: Create QuotePack data model with seed packs. Build QuotePacksView with search bar and pack rows matching Figma.

title: QuotePackDetailView + install flow
description: Pack detail screen with description, preview quotes, install button, and Pack Added success overlay.

title: Archive model + ArchiveView with filters
description: Add isHidden/isArchived to Quote model. Build ArchiveView with All/Hidden/Deleted filter tabs, quote cards, restore/delete actions, empty states.

title: Phase 7 build verification
description: Full xcodebuild verification of all Phase 7 changes.

title: Phase 8: Quote Actions contextual sheet (Share, Favorites, Collection, Copy, Edit, Hide, Delete)
description: Create QuoteActionsSheet view with 7 action rows matching Figma. Present from QuoteView via sheet. Wire actions to existing functionality.

title: Phase 8: Delete confirmation alert dialog
description: Alert dialog: Delete Quote? with archive message, Cancel/Delete buttons. Trigger from QuoteActionsSheet delete action.

title: Phase 8: Coach marks feature tour
description: Tooltip-style coach marks: Swipe for More Quotes with Skip/Next, step counter. Show on first launch after onboarding.

title: Phase 8: Notification center in-app inbox
description: NotificationCenterView with notification items (Daily Quote, Streak Reminder, New Pack, Weekly Summary). Mark All Read. Present from Home nav bar.

title: Phase 8: Build verification
description: xcodebuild verification of all Phase 8 changes

title: Create RuneInfo data model with all rune definitions for 3 scripts
description: RuneInfo struct with glyph, name, meaning, sound, script. Static arrays for Elder Futhark (24), Younger Futhark (16), Cirth.

title: Create RuneReferenceView with searchable grid for all 3 scripts
description: Grid view with script picker, 4-column LazyVGrid of GlassCard rune cells. Search bar, dark/light support.

title: Create RuneDetailView with rune info card
description: Detail view showing large glyph, name, meaning, sound/transliteration, historical note. GlassCard with adaptive palette.

title: Wire RuneReferenceView into navigation + build verify
description: Add NavigationLink from CollectionsView or tab. Run xcodebuild build.

title: Phase 10: Migrate widget views to adaptive palette + DesignTokens
description: Replace legacy palette tokens (primaryText/secondaryText/tertiaryText/divider) with adaptive tokens (textPrimary/textSecondary/textTertiary/separator). Replace hardcoded spacing/radii with DesignTokens. Update background gradient to use adaptive colors. Update all 6 widget families: systemSmall, systemMedium, systemLarge, accessoryCircular, accessoryRectangular, accessoryInline.

title: Phase 10: Add widget configuration intent
description: Add AppIntent-based configuration for widget: script selection, style (runeFirst/translationFirst), collection filter. Replace StaticConfiguration with AppIntentConfiguration.

title: Phase 10: Build verification
description: Run xcodebuild -scheme RunicQuotes build to verify all Phase 10 changes compile. Final build gate for design refactor completion.
